name: Stakeholder-Based Filters
description: Filter graph nodes by stakeholder role, audience, and access level

filters.name: Developer/Engineering
filters.description: Show technical implementation details and code architecture

filters.name: Architect/Design
filters.query: tag:#audience/architect OR tag:#architecture OR tag:#design-pattern OR tag:#system-design
filters.description: Show system architecture, design patterns, and technical strategy

filters.name: Security Team
filters.query: tag:#audience/security-team OR tag:#security OR tag:#vulnerability OR tag:#penetration-testing
filters.description: Show security operations, vulnerability management, and security testing

filters.name: QA/Testing Team
filters.query: tag:#audience/qa OR tag:#testing OR tag:#test-case OR tag:#qa-engineer
filters.description: Show test plans, QA procedures, and validation frameworks

filters.name: DevOps/SRE
filters.query: tag:#audience/devops OR tag:#infrastructure OR tag:#deployment OR tag:#sre
filters.description: Show infrastructure, deployment, monitoring, and operations

filters.name: Product/Business
filters.query: tag:#audience/product-owner OR tag:#business-logic OR tag:#feature-spec OR tag:#requirements
filters.description: Show product requirements, business logic, and feature specifications

filters.name: End User
filters.query: tag:#audience/end-user OR tag:#user-guide OR tag:#tutorial OR tag:#quickstart
filters.description: Show user guides, tutorials, and end-user documentation

filters.name: Executive/Leadership
filters.query: tag:#audience/executive OR tag:#executive-summary OR tag:#strategic OR tag:#roadmap
filters.description: Show executive summaries, strategic decisions, and business impact

filters.name: Compliance/Legal
filters.query: tag:#audience/compliance OR tag:#legal OR tag:#audit OR tag:#regulatory
filters.description: Show compliance requirements, legal considerations, and audit trails

filters.name: Customer Support
filters.query: tag:#audience/support OR tag:#troubleshooting OR tag:#faq OR tag:#known-issues
filters.description: Show troubleshooting guides, FAQs, and known issues

filters.name: Internal/Confidential
filters.description: Show internal documentation not for external distribution

filters.name: Public Documentation
filters.useCase: Open source contribution and public knowledge sharing

restricted.description: Restricted to specific teams or roles

applyingFilters: Select stakeholder role to see relevant documentation
Combine with access level filtering for information security
Use for role-based knowledge management and onboarding

stakeholderViews.newDeveloperOnboarding: Show: developer-view, architect-view | Hide: executive, compliance
stakeholderViews.securityAudit: Show: security-view, compliance-view | Hide: user-view, product-view
stakeholderViews.productPlanning: Show: product-view, executive-view, user-view | Hide: developer-view
stakeholderViews.executiveBriefing: Show: executive-view, product-view | Hide: developer, qa, devops
stakeholderViews.publicDocumentation: Show: public-docs, user-view | Hide: internal-only, confidential

informationArchitecture.segregationStrategy: Tag documents with primary and secondary audiences
informationArchitecture.accessControl: Use access levels to enforce information security policies
informationArchitecture.knowledgeSharing: Balance between need-to-know and knowledge democratization
informationArchitecture.documentationOwnership: Assign stakeholder groups as document owners

collaborationPatterns.crossFunctional: Use multiple audience tags for shared documentation
collaborationPatterns.approvalWorkflows: Track approval requirements by stakeholder role
collaborationPatterns.communicationChannels: Link stakeholder views to Slack channels, email lists
